items.title: AI Coaching
items.description: Practice real-world conversations against an AI character that scores you.

items.title: How can a User submit an AI Coaching attempt?
items.description: This guide explains how to complete an AI coaching assignment as a sales rep or field rep.

items.title: How can a User View Feedback After Submitting an AI Coaching?
items.description: This guide explains how to access and review feedback after completing an AI coaching assignment.

items.title: How can I download Attempt-wise User Objective Report?
items.description: This report provides objective-level performance data for each attempt.

items.title: How do I download Attempt-wise Coaching Report?
items.description: This report shows all attempts for a specific coaching.

items.title: How do I download Coaching-wise Report?
items.description: This report focuses on one specific coaching.

items.title: How do I download Overall Coaching Report?
items.description: This report summarizes all coaching activities across all users.

items.title: How do I track improvement?
items.description: The AI Coaching Dashboard gives you a complete view of how your team is performing in AI roleplay practice.

items.title: How do I track improvements for multiple role-plays at the same time?
items.description: You can track improvement across multiple roleplays simultaneously by using the Filters feature on the Coaching Dashboard.

items.title: How do I view submissions as they happen?
items.description: This feature allows editors, trainers, and admins to view video coaching submissions from users in real time.

items.title: How many learners have submitted their responses?
items.description: You can find this information in the Active Learners metric on the AI Coaching Dashboard.

items.title: How many type of coaching reports are available on Smartwinnr?
items.description: Coaching reports provide critical insights into learner performance, skill development, and training effectiveness.

items.title: How to Review AI Coaching Submissions as a Manager?
items.description: As a manager, you can review AI coaching submissions from your team members. When a rep completes an AI role-play, you have the option to provide additional…

items.title: Understanding the Competency & Skills Insights Tab on the AI Coaching Dashboard
Understanding the feedback screen
items.description: The Analytics section allows you to watch your recorded AI coaching attempt and review your actual performance.

items.title: Understanding the Overview Analysis Tab on the AI Coaching Dashboard
Understanding the Participation Insights Tab on the AI Coaching Dashboard
items.description: This tab provides a high-level view of participation, activity trends, and AI-generated insights.

items.title: What is AI Coaching?
items.description: AI Coaching in SmartWinnr is a feature that allows users to practice conversations with HCPs in a simulated environment and receive automated evaluation.
